title: NIMHANS Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 03 Accountant, Junior Secretarial Assistant Posts
description: The National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 03 Neuroanaesthesia Technologist, Accountant, and Junior Secretarial Assistant Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree and B.Sc can apply for the NIMHANS Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode....
